allow: Bash(bun pm ls --all 2>/dev/null | grep astrojs/node; curl -s https://registry.npmjs.org/@astrojs/node | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d['versions'].keys\(\)\)[-5:]\)" 2>/dev/null || bun x npm-view @astrojs/node version 2>/dev/null)
Bash(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 4321 || netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 4321 || echo "port 4321 not listening")
